orchestrationApis.name: Retail API
orchestrationApis.description: Primary channel-facing orchestration layer for the Apex Air reservation system. Coordinates the complete passenger journey from flight search through booking, payment, check-in, and boarding.

orchestrationApis.name: Loyalty API
orchestrationApis.description: Channel-facing orchestration layer for all loyalty programme interactions. Coordinates identity and customer microservices for authentication, profile management, and points.

orchestrationApis.name: Operations API
orchestrationApis.description: Internal orchestration layer for airline operations staff. Manages flight schedules, generating bulk flight inventory and fare records via Schedule MS and Offer MS.

orchestrationApis.name: Disruption API
orchestrationApis.description: Internal orchestration layer for disruption event handling. Coordinates the reservation system response to flight delays and cancellations notified by the Flight Operations System.

microservices.name: Offer Microservice
microservices.description: System of record for flight inventory, fare definitions, stored offer snapshots, and per-flight seat availability.

microservices.name: Order Microservice
microservices.description: Manages the complete booking lifecycle from basket creation through confirmation, post-sale changes, and cancellation. Built on the IATA ONE Order standard.

microservices.name: Payment Microservice
microservices.description: Financial orchestration layer for all Apex Air transactions. Manages card payment authorisation, settlement, and refund operations.

microservices.name: Delivery Microservice
microservices.description: System of record for issued travel documents and departure operations. Manages e-tickets, passenger manifests, ancillary EMDs, and boarding card generation.

microservices.name: Customer Microservice
microservices.description: System of record for loyalty programme membership. Manages customer profiles, tier status, points balances, and transaction history.

microservices.name: Seat Microservice
microservices.description: System of record for aircraft seatmap definitions, fleet-wide seat pricing rules, and seat offer generation.

microservices.name: Bag Microservice
microservices.description: System of record for checked baggage policies and ancillary bag pricing. Responsible for bag offer generation with deterministic BagOfferId values.

microservices.name: Schedule Microservice
microservices.description: Internal persistence layer for flight schedule definitions. Stores schedule records, enumerates operating dates, and tracks flights created count.

microservices.name: Identity Microservice
microservices.description: Security boundary for all authentication and credential management. Manages user accounts, login, JWT token issuance, password resets, and email changes.

other.name: Template API
other.description: Template API for the reservation system. Provides a baseline scaffolding for new API development.
